hooks.command: b=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); head=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null); parents=$(git rev-list --parents -n1 HEAD 2>/dev/null | wc -w); marker=".git/.last-auto-deploy-sha"; last=$(cat "$marker" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$b" = "develop" ] && [ "$parents" -ge 3 ] && [ "$head" != "$last" ] && [ -x ./build-docker.sh ]; then echo "$head" > "$marker"; log="/tmp/cantou-auto-deploy-$(date +%s).log"; nohup ./build-docker.sh --deploy > "$log" 2>&1 & echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Merge dans develop détecté (${head:0:7}) → build APK + envoi Telegram lancé en arrière-plan ($log).\"}"; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Merge develop détecté — build+déploiement Telegram en arrière-plan
